type: CLAIM

summary: Adding sort_palette parameter to Image.quantize() for custom palette color ordering after quantization

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: Added error_threshold kwarg (after dither) to Image.quantize(), a quantize_to() nested helper, and a new self._mean_squared_error() method; please add sort_palette as a new trailing kwarg and avoid restructuring the existing body so we don't clobber each other

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py
summary: Done: quantize() now accepts error_threshold; implementation only adds a nested quantize_to() helper and appends the new self._mean_squared_error() method, existing lines otherwise untouched aside from the signature/docstring

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Done: quantize() now accepts sort_palette as trailing kwarg after dither ('luminance' or 'rgb'); added new _sort_palette() helper method, only touched the two lines building im.palette and added the sort_palette dispatch after; existing lines otherwise untouched

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Finished sort_palette feature: quantize() gains a trailing sort_palette kwarg ('luminance'|'rgb'), new Image._sort_palette() helper, tests added; patch.txt written
